projects.title: CLOWN
projects.content: In a surreal fusion of live-action and AI-generated imagery, CLOWN centers on a talented clown who gradually loses her sense of self in pursuit of audience approval. Five AI tools were used: Runway, Midjourney, Autodesk, Artlist, and ChatGPT.
projects.author: Shanshan Jiang

projects.title: Vision
projects.content: "Vision" reflects on the influence of AI. Created in dialogue and collaboration with AI. AI tools used: OpenAI's ChatGPT for dialogue and code generation, Runway for image and video generation.
projects.author: Susanne Layla Petersen

projects.title: Nursing Home
projects.content: Digital storytelling through the personified character of a sentient seed paper, portraying a journey of self-identity exploration in the age of artificial intelligence.
projects.author: Chi Kiu So

projects.title: The Fold of Awakening
projects.content: "The Fold of Awakening" follows Sid's journey of growth and self-realization, exploring themes of identity and meaning in the age of AI. Through metaphors and visual symbolism, the story illustrates how one can draw strength from conflict and imperfection.
projects.author: Fan Pan

projects.title: Metro Ruins
projects.content: A sci-fi, post-apocalyptic, cyberpunk psychological thriller. In a post-apocalyptic city eroded by alienation and technology, a lost individual attempts to find meaning and connection. 100% AI-generated.
projects.author: Tianli Ma

projects.title: Her
projects.content: A surreal AI-generated short film that explores fear, trauma, and the silent resistance of a woman reclaiming her inner power. Blending hyperreal 3D imagery with painterly illustration.
projects.author: Yidan Hu

projects.title: Transmissions
projects.content: "Transmissions" explores the intersection of sound and vision, reimagining the visual music tradition for the digital age. This experimental work transforms audio into intricate visual compositions.
projects.author: Chris May

projects.title: For the love of nature
projects.content: A completely AI-generated "fake commercial" that explores the capabilities of generative AI in forming emotional connections and transmitting personality and purpose.
projects.author: Anna di Luce

projects.title: Format Error occurred at offset
projects.content: The film cuts through the administrative paperwork required for the director to live in different countries and explores the ambiguity and fragility of identity in the bureaucratic system.
projects.author: Zirui Chen

projects.title: Data Journeying Far and Wide
projects.content: Based on the Northern Song dynasty masterpiece 'A Thousand Li of Rivers and Mountains', this work transforms the landscape's visual essence into a flowing data stream, presented as a digital scroll painting.
projects.author: Ling Cui

projects.title: Mourning Skins: A Time-lapse Photography Series
projects.content: Explores the silent transformations of animal life under the relentless pressure of climate change, bridging the seemingly intangible phenomenon of global warming with tangible, visible shifts in animals' appearances.
projects.author: Yechun Peng

projects.title: Inner peace
projects.content: An AI-generated exploration of tranquility and inner harmony.
